prompt: Marketing filed three tickets that I'm now convinced are the same bug. (1) Hit 'Duplicate' on a campaign, tweak the copy's UTM source, and the ORIGINAL campaign's links change too. (2) Add a segment to the duplicate — the original grows it as well. (3) The worst one: brand-new campaigns created later start life with some earlier campaign's segments and send window already applied, as if the base template itself is getting scribbled on. I spent an hour blaming our JSON round-trip cache, but the API layer checks out clean — it has to be campaigns.py. python3 test_campaigns.py captures all three complaints. Make them pass without modifying the test file, and run it so I can see it green.
